title: Garden Fresh Ukrainian Vegetable Salad
description: A refreshing and herbal Ukrainian salad featuring raw vegetables and a soffritto base, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Prepare the soffritto base by heating the olive oil in a pan over low heat.
Add the thinly sliced onions to the pan and cook until they are translucent.
Add the grated carrots to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
In a large bowl, combine the cooled soffritto base, sliced cucumbers, bell peppers, and diced tomatoes.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh dill over the top of the salad and toss to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
